01.trap: Asserts the new resin supplier as the established cause (new resin -> defects) and triggers a costly contract break, though problem.txt confirms only the defect rise and the coincidental onboarding.

02.trap: Asserts a miscalibrated injection-molding machine as the established cause and commits downtime, though no machine inspection is confirmed in problem.txt.

03.note: Treats the resin as one unverified hypothesis and requires batch-level correlation before breaking the contract.

04.note: Acts only on the confirmed fact (defect rise) with reversible quarantine/containment; asserts no cause.
